_comment: That directory is gitignored (.gitignore:41) — secrets never reach git.
SECURITY: Prefer $VAR references (e.g. '$KIBANA_API_KEY') over inline secrets.
$VAR values are resolved from shell environment variables at load time.
Usage: add 'Environment: profile <name>' to your invocation or session.example.yaml.
The agent loads this file, resolves $VAR fields, and skips re-prompting credentials.
name: staging
_note_api_key: Field name uses underscore (api_key); YAML invocation uses api-key (hyphen). Same concept, different syntax.
